title: MarketRegime As-of Gate Validation
disclaimer: research tool only — no auto trading — no precision prediction claim — no DB write — no external API — no LLM call — no strategy mutation — no regime logic mutation — no performance claim — no edge claim

getLatestMarketRegimeContext.previousBehavior: prisma.marketRegimeResult.findFirst({ orderBy: { date: 'desc' } }) — NO date upper bound
getLatestMarketRegimeContext.p004Behavior: prisma.marketRegimeResult.findFirst({ where: asOf ? { date: { lte: asOf } } : undefined, orderBy: { date: 'desc' } })
getLatestMarketRegimeContext.safetyNet: If row.date > asOf after DB query, returns FUTURE_DATE_ERROR — does not fallback to bullish/valid

regimeRouteIntegration.change: Added asOfDate query param, passed as 2nd arg to getLatestMarketRegimeContext()

sourceDateValidation.fallbackBehavior: MISSING or FUTURE_DATE_ERROR — never silently returns regime as valid
